<!-- Keep it focused. Reference any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new/changed behavior
- [ ] No secrets committed (real secrets go in gitignored `.dev.vars` or `wrangler secret put` — the tracked `.env*` files hold only public base URLs)
- [ ] Updated docs where needed (README / SETUP / CLAUDE.md / rules)
